MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
David Stephen Zalob, Esq. of the Law Office of Stephen Zalob, Tel. 415.788.2465, counsel for plaintiff, and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: There being no obejction, the Court adopted its tentative ruling. ATTORNEY DAVID STEPHEN ZALOB'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL OF RECORD FOR PLAINTIFF KEN MONTERO is granted. No opposition provided. Order signed. Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Gordon F. Aiavao, CSR # 11216, email: gaiavao@sftc.org.
